title: NRG Stadium
extract: NRG Stadium, currently known as Houston Stadium for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and previously known, and to be renamed, as Reliant Stadium following the event, is a retractable roof multi-purpose stadium in Houston, Texas, U.S. Construction was completed in 2002, at a cost of $352 million and has a seating capacity of 72,220. It was the first NFL facility to have a retractable roof.
